task_completion.visual_evidence: A terminal window or text editor displaying the contents of /home/ga/task_data.txt, revealing a Case Number.

task_completion.description: Locate and open the specific complaint case in the ArkCase Complaints module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase web interface showing the Complaints module with the specific case opened, displaying its details and description.

task_completion.description: Verify the subject's email in the ArkCase People module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase People module open, showing the subject's profile and an email address ending in '@arkcase.com' or '@agency.gov'.
The case details screen in ArkCase showing the Priority field successfully changed to 'High'.

task_completion.description: Add a note stating 'Internal Affairs: Subject is a verified employee.'
task_completion.visual_evidence: The case notes or comments section in ArkCase displaying a newly added note with the exact text 'Internal Affairs: Subject is a verified employee.'

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the ArkCase graphical user interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser navigating the ArkCase application, rather than terminal commands executing API calls to complete the task.

integrity.description: The agent manually entered the note and updated the priority in the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the note text being typed into the ArkCase note input field and the priority dropdown being interacted with.

integrity.description: The agent did not mock the final state in a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The final state showing the updated priority and note is clearly within the ArkCase web application, not a local text file or HTML mock.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The agent should authenticate using 'arkcase-admin@dev.arkcase.com' and 'ArkCase1234!'. The subject's email will end in '@arkcase.com'. The target case priority must be set to 'High', and the added note must contain the keyword 'Internal Affairs'.
